SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-08-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-08-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY WAS REPRESENTED BY FRANK TAYLOR--CCSF. DEFENDANT TEGSCO ETC. WAS REPRESENTED BY DAN SCANLAN--VP TOWING & QUALITY ASSURANCE. NO COSTS, IFP FILED BY PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PLACEK, EDWARD IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TEGSCO LLC DBA SAN FRANCISCO AUTO RETURN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
